resolution_of_sojourner.name: Resolution of Sojourner
resolution_of_sojourner.bonus_4pc: Increases Charged Attack CRIT Rate by 30%.

brave_heart.name: Brave Heart
brave_heart.bonus_4pc: Increases DMG by 30% against opponents with more than 50% HP.

defenders_will.name: Defender's Will
defenders_will.bonus_4pc: For each different element present in your own party, the wearer's Elemental RES to that corresponding element is increased by 30%.

tiny_miracle.name: Tiny Miracle
tiny_miracle.bonus_4pc: Incoming elemental DMG increases corresponding Elemental RES by 30% for 10s. Can only occur once every 10s.

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.bonus_4pc: When HP is below 70%, CRIT Rate increases by an additional 24%.

martial_artist.name: Martial Artist
martial_artist.bonus_4pc: After using Elemental Skill, increases Normal Attack and Charged Attack DMG by 25% for 8s.

instructor.name: Instructor
instructor.bonus_4pc: Upon triggering an Elemental Reaction, increases all party members' Elemental Mastery by 120 for 8s.

gambler.name: Gambler
gambler.bonus_4pc: Defeating an opponent has a 100% chance to remove Elemental Skill CD. Can only occur once every 15s.

the_exile.name: The Exile
the_exile.bonus_4pc: Using an Elemental Burst regenerates 2 Energy for all party members (excluding the wearer) every 2s for 6s. This effect cannot stack.

scholar.name: Scholar
scholar.bonus_4pc: Gaining Elemental Particles or Orbs gives 3 Energy to all party members who have a bow or a catalyst equipped. Can only occur once every 3s.

prayers_for_illumination.name: Prayers for Illumination
prayers_for_illumination.bonus_1pc: Affected by Pyro for 40% less time.

prayers_for_destiny.name: Prayers for Destiny
prayers_for_destiny.bonus_1pc: Affected by Hydro for 40% less time.

prayers_for_wisdom.name: Prayers for Wisdom
prayers_for_wisdom.bonus_1pc: Affected by Electro for 40% less time.

prayers_to_the_firmament.name: Prayers to the Firmament
prayers_to_the_firmament.bonus_1pc: Affected by Anemo for 40% less time.

prayers_to_springtime.name: Prayers to Springtime
prayers_to_springtime.bonus_1pc: Affected by Cryo for 40% less time.
